nasb.text: and he said to Him, “All these things I will give You, if You fall down and worship me.”

esv.text: And he said to him, “All these I will give you, if you will fall down and worship me.”

cnv.text: 並且對他說：“你只要跪下來拜我，我就把這一切都給你。”

ccb.text: 说：“如果你俯伏敬拜我，我就把这一切都给你。”

csbs.text: 对他说：“你如果俯伏拜我，我就把这一切都给你。”
